mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbsi_user WHERE uid = #{uid} AND use_flg = 'Y'

SELECT u.uid, u.hp, u.setter_nm AS setterNm, u.getter_nm AS getterNm, u.rl_nm AS rlNm, c.resp_dt AS respDt, c.t1, c.t2, c.start_dt AS startDt, c.end_dt AS endDt, c.main_txt AS mainTxt FROM tbsi_user u INNER JOIN tbsi_pp_content c ON c.uid = u.uid WHERE u.uid = #{uid} AND u.use_flg = 'Y' AND c.use_flg = 'Y'
